rationale: op_db emits stride/padding as kwargs (not positional) for avg_pool3d — the runner arm at tools/parity-sweep/runner/src/main.rs:4455-4462 reads args.get(2)/(3) instead of kwargs.get("stride")/("padding"), so a kwargs-only sample collapses to stride=kernel_size+padding=0 and produces a smaller output shape than upstream. Pinned by the 4-failure sweep on nn.functional.avg_pool3d (seed=0 i=3, seed=0 i=7, seed=1 i=3, seed=1 i=7).
